creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to VVD from comment #3)

For parallel build systems, something like TMPDIR=/tmp/portbuild/lang_gcc11/ would be reasonable to ease deleting leftovers of broken builds.

I'm using tmpfs for /tmp, so simple reboot cleans everything.
But if someone having dedicated physical partition for /tmp, it could be difficult for certain cases if everything is directly under /tmp.
